fixtures.description: Strong full-stack developer candidate matching a full-stack JD - 8/11 signals, 3 nice-to-have gaps
fixtures.resume:
Jane Smith
San Francisco, CA | jane@example.com

Summary
Full-stack software engineer with 4 years of experience building scalable web applications. Strong background in Python, Node.js, and React. Experienced with cloud infrastructure on AWS.

Experience
Software Engineer - Acme Corp (2021-present)
- Designed and shipped REST APIs using Python and Node.js serving 500k daily requests
- Built React dashboards integrated with GraphQL-free REST endpoints, reducing load time by 40%
- Deployed microservices to AWS Lambda, S3, and EC2 using Docker containers
- Maintained PostgreSQL databases with 99.9% uptime across 3 production environments
- Established CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions; code coverage improved from 60% to 90%
- Collaborated in Agile/Scrum sprints, participating in sprint planning, standups, and retrospectives
- Used Git for version control across a team of 8 engineers

Junior Engineer - Beta Inc (2019-2021)
- Built internal Python tooling for data processing pipelines
- Contributed to React front-end features for customer portal

Education
B.S. Computer Science - State University (2019)

Skills
Python, Node.js, React, AWS (Lambda, S3, EC2), PostgreSQL, Docker, Git, CI/CD, Agile, Scrum, REST APIs, JavaScript, TypeScript
fixtures.jd:
Full-Stack Software Engineer

About the Role
We are building the next generation of developer tooling and are looking for a talented Full-Stack Engineer to join our team.

Responsibilities
- Build and maintain scalable backend services
- Develop React-based front-end features
- Collaborate with the product team in an Agile environment

Requirements
- 3-5 years of professional software engineering experience
- Proficiency in Python and Node.js
- Experience with React for front-end development
- Hands-on experience with AWS services (Lambda, S3, EC2)
- Strong knowledge of PostgreSQL
- Familiarity with Docker, Git, and CI/CD pipelines
- Experience working in Agile/Scrum teams

Nice to Have
- Experience with GraphQL
- Kubernetes or container orchestration experience
- Prior startup experience

About Us
We are a well-funded startup transforming the developer experience. We offer competitive salaries, equity, and great benefits.

Benefits
- Competitive salary and equity
- Health, dental, and vision insurance
- Unlimited PTO

Equal Opportunity
We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity.

fixtures.description: Chef resume vs software engineering JD - completely unrelated
fixtures.resume:
Mario Rossi
New York, NY

Summary
Executive chef with 12 years of experience in fine dining and Michelin-starred restaurants.

Experience
Head Chef - Le Bistro Paris, New York (2018-present)
- Designed seasonal menus featuring classic French cuisine
- Managed kitchen staff of 15 cooks and prep chefs
- Supervised food procurement, quality control, and inventory
- Introduced sourdough bread and artisan pastry program
- Reduced food waste by 20% through portion control initiatives

Sous Chef - The Grand Hotel, Boston (2012-2018)
- Assisted head chef with menu development and staff training
- Specialized in pastry and baking - croissants, macarons, tarts

Education
Culinary Arts Degree - Culinary Institute of America (2012)

Skills
French cuisine, pastry, baking, yeast fermentation, sourdough, kitchen management, food safety, inventory management, staff training
